## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change (unit + integration where applicable; RBAC changes assert 403s; audited actions assert audit records)
- [ ] **If this PR completes an item listed under a "Remaining" section in `docs/phase_completion_status.md`, that document is updated in this PR** (see issue #46 — stale status docs mislead contributors and auditors)
- [ ] Governance-scoped files (auth/RBAC/audit/tenancy/workflows — see `CLAUDE.md`) are untouched, or the required agent reviews are noted below
- [ ] New endpoints/models have docstrings; ADR added in `docs/decisions/` for cross-cutting changes
